CREATE TABLE h3_index_table (id UInt64, h3Index UInt64);
SELECT h3ToGeo(h3Index) AS coordinates FROM h3_index_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT h3ToGeo(h3Index) AS coordinates FROM h3_index_table WHERE h3Index > 644325524701193970;
SELECT id, h3ToGeo(h3Index) AS coordinates FROM h3_index_table ORDER BY id DESC;
WITH (SELECT h3Index FROM h3_index_table WHERE id = 2) AS inner_query SELECT h3ToGeo(inner_query) AS coordinates;
CREATE TABLE coordinates_table (lon Float64, lat Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (lon, lat);
INSERT INTO coordinates_table SELECT h3ToGeo(h3Index) FROM h3_index_table;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_coordinates FROM coordinates_table WHERE lon IS NOT NULL AND lat IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.id, h3ToGeo(t1.h3Index) FROM h3_index_table t1 JOIN (SELECT h3Index FROM h3_index_table WHERE id < 3) t2 ON t1.h3Index = t2.h3Index;
